---

**What would your suggestion accomplish? Please describe. **
As a user I suggest adding [Your suggestion idea], this would be a good idea because it [What your suggested idea does/is].

**What is are the implications of this? what would be changed? **
A clear and concise description of the implications of how adding your suggestion could change the project.
A clear and in-depth description of what would need to be changed to accommodate your suggestion.

**Where and how should this be added (be specific)? **
Add additional specifications to how your suggestion should be implemented and where what specific functions of the feature should be placed.
